paragraphQuestions.paragraph: Learning a new language opens up many opportunities for travel and work. It allows people to connect with different cultures on a deeper level. Many students choose to study English because it is used globally in business and science. While it takes time and practice, the rewards of being bilingual are worth the effort.
questions: Why do many people choose to study English specifically?
What are two main areas of life where language skills provide opportunities?
How does the author describe the process of learning a language?
What is the ultimate benefit mentioned at the end of the paragraph?

paragraphQuestions.paragraph: Sustainable living is becoming more popular as people worry about the environment. Small changes, like reducing plastic use and recycling, can make a big difference over time. Many families are also trying to save energy by using LED bulbs and turning off lights. Protecting the planet requires everyone to cooperate and change their daily habits.
questions: What is the primary reason sustainable living is gaining popularity?
Name two small changes mentioned that help the environment.
How are families specifically trying to save energy at home?
What does the author suggest is necessary to protect the planet?

paragraphQuestions.paragraph: The history of cinema began in the late 19th century with very short, silent films. Early audiences were amazed just to see moving images on a screen. As technology improved, filmmakers started adding sound, color, and special effects to tell complex stories. Today, movies are a major part of global entertainment and culture.
questions: When did the history of cinema begin?
What was the initial reaction of early audiences to movies?
What three technical improvements helped filmmakers tell better stories?
What role do movies play in modern society according to the text?

paragraphQuestions.paragraph: Healthy eating is essential for maintaining high energy levels throughout the day. A balanced diet should include plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains. It is also important to drink enough water and avoid consuming too much sugar. When people eat well, they often feel more focused and productive in their work.
questions: What is the main benefit of healthy eating mentioned in the first sentence?
What three food groups should be included in a balanced diet?
What two dietary habits should people avoid or monitor carefully?
How does a good diet affect a person's performance at work?

paragraphQuestions.paragraph: Remote work has transformed the way modern companies operate across the globe. Employees now have the flexibility to work from home or from different countries. This shift has reduced the need for large office spaces and long daily commutes. However, it also requires strong self-discipline and good communication skills to be successful.
questions: How has the location of work changed for many employees?
What are two physical things that are less necessary due to remote work?
What personal qualities does a remote worker need to succeed?
What is the general impact of remote work on company operations?
